_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: Cenpf expression demonstrated upregulation in MPNST compared to both PNF (p=0.0647) and ANNUBP (p=0.0783) in the PostnCre model, though not achieving significance
details: Cenpf expression demonstrated upregulation in MPNST compared to both PNF (p=0.0647) and ANNUBP (p=0.0783) but not achieving significance
